message:
refactor(abi): replace link-name allocator symbols with OnceLock-cached versioned dlvsym resolution

malloc_abi: Replace unsafe extern link_name declarations for
__libc_malloc/calloc/realloc/free/memalign@GLIBC_2.2.5 with
OnceLock-cached function pointers resolved via dlvsym_next at first
use. Add resolve_host_allocator_symbol() with GLIBC_2.2.5 → 2.34 →
unversioned fallback chain. Add prewarm_host_allocator_symbols() for
eager bootstrap resolution. Wire all native_libc_*() functions to
use the resolved pointers. This eliminates the link-name symbols
that caused infinite recursion when glibc_internal_abi's unversioned
__libc_malloc alias was resolved by the dynamic linker instead.

startup_abi: Expand early initialization sequence to call
prewarm_host_allocator_symbols() alongside thread symbol prewarming.

stdlib_abi: Remove redundant allocator-related code consolidated
into malloc_abi.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
